name: 加利尔AR | 血橙游骑兵
nameZh: 加利尔AR | 血橙游骑兵
descriptionEn: A less expensive option among the terrorist-exclusive assault rifles, the Galil AR is a serviceable weapon in medium to long-range combat. Its metallic brown base is finished with high vis orange accents. Rule number one: always know what is behind your target
descriptionZh: 在T专用的突击步枪中，这把武器是较为便宜的选择，加利尔AR是一把中远距离作战的耐用武器。 枪身采用了金属棕基底配高亮橙涂装。 第一守则：永远看清目标背后
